name: @aarmos/avar-verify-wasm
description: Portable WebAssembly build of the AVAR bundle verifier. Bit-for-bit parity with @aarmos/avar-core — same canonicalization, same hash chain, same Ed25519 verification. Run under Wasmtime, Wasmer, or any WASI-preview1 host to verify Aarmos receipts from Go, Rust, Python, or plain shell.
version_note: Ships prebuilt dist/verify.wasm; rebuild with `npm run build` (requires javy on PATH).
author: Aarmatix LLC
